channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Another mattress, 25th April
item.description:
Yet another mattress appears

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost has been knocked, 25th April
item.description:
Reported this before,Conway came around to look and just drove off after looking at it,on the report it says fixed but it's not been fixed,the lamppost is actually leaning a bit and the light is twisted to the side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ingleton Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped fridge., 25th April
item.description:
Hello, This has been here a few days now. And is attracting other items, which are being dumped. Thank you : )

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Mews, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree blocking light, 25th April
item.description:
The tree has grown so much it's blocking the light on my terrace. I have cut back as much as I can but, it needs professional attention.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakfield Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pink bag fly tipping continued with foxies ripping up food laden bags, 25th April
item.description:
The council did a lovely job cleaning up the Standard area yesterday in preparation of the Marathon tomorrow. The pink bag brigade have managed to get their household bags out on the streets in time for the foxes to undo all that hard work.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping trolley, 25th April
item.description:
Shopping trolley on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Blyth Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 7 mildenhall road, 25th April
item.description:
Right by the parking base - thought a suspension was needed to do this?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mildenhall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vomit on road and street needs cleansing, 25th April
item.description:
Hello there is vomit on the road and the street needs cleansing as there is litter and tree debris too. Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Durham Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sewage leak flowing on the ground., 25th April
item.description:
Another sewage leak behind Portelet Court requires urgent attention. Just by the Children's playground.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unemptied blue recycling bin, 25th April
item.description:
This bin is overflowing. On the pavement. Left unemptied because the householder has put lots of items in plastic bags. I understand why it had not been emptied HOWEVER this bin will now sit as a hazard on the pavement and overflow the contents as litter all along the road. Surely there needs to be a way of collecting this refuse, rather than leaving it to cause further problems and generally make the borough look down at heel and dreadful? Please remove and educate the householder.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mayfield Crescent, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture dumped in Langdon Road BR2 9JS, 25th April
item.description:
This is the second time in a fortnight that furniture has been dumped here. i`m notsure if it the responsibility of the mainsonettes but this is unsightly and really lazy that the owner is not disposing of their own discarded furniture
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Langdon Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked pathway, 25th April
item.description:
The privet hedge at 125 Newlands Park se26 is overgrown,untidy and hanging so far over its blocking the footpath. Needs trimming back.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newlands Park, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint tin dumped by public bin, 25th April
item.description:
Someone has flytipped a large paint pot next to the public bin outside the barber's.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Somerville Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste (looks like electricals) dumped next to public bin, 25th April
item.description:
There's a black bag of rubbish next to the bin by the underpass at New Beckenham station (Lennard Rd side). Wires are poking out so I suspect it's electrical goods. They are also coming out of the bin opposite. What3words ///number.bikes.speak

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pavilion Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large cardboard box and plastic pipe dumped, 25th April
item.description:
This big cardboard box has been on the verge by the park for weeks now. There is a business address in Beckenham on it. There's also a bit of plastic piping a couple of metres away. What3words ///shout.pillow.basin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned trolley, 25th April
item.description:
Trolley left outside Blythwood park, Blyth Road BR1

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Blyth Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken paving slab and risk of tripping, 25th April
item.description:
Broken paving slab with risk of tripping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Olney Road, Walworth, Greater London

item.title: There is a dead fox behind the bushes of this bus stop, 25th April
item.description:
The foxes head is sticking out of the bushes and now there are lots of flies

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Catlin Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree root raising the pavement., 25th April
item.description:
This is a trip hazard, and an obstruction for buggies/mobility aids. I fell over this today.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Forest Ridge, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping by park entrance, 25th April
item.description:
Large bag of Flytipping at the entrance to Hoblingwell Wood carpark.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Leesons Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
